name: Intro to Markets
description: A 6-week introductory course covering market fundamentals, chart reading, and portfolio construction.

weeks.journal_prompt: Research one major stock index (S&P 500, Nasdaq, or Dow Jones). What does it measure and why does it matter?
Pick a stock and describe what you see on its 3-month chart. Identify any patterns or trends.
Compare the volume patterns of two stocks over the past week. What might high or low volume indicate?
Choose two sectors and compare their recent performance. What economic factors might explain the difference?
Create a 5-stock watchlist with a brief thesis for each pick. What criteria did you use to select them?
Design a mock portfolio with $10,000. Explain your allocation strategy and risk management approach.
